title: Midnight-Cringing Croatian Tomatoes Braise
description: A peppery and silky Croatian dish featuring cherry tomatoes in a rich braise, suitable for Ayurvedic and sattvic diets. This recipe is perfect for a satisfying dinner or lunch, with a balance of flavors and textures.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the bell pepper and cook for another 3 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes, bay leaves, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cover the pot and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the braise cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh parsley or basil, if desired.
